Dolmabahçe Palace (afternoon)

timeline.title: Balat & Departure Day
items: Balat (colorful town)
Spa: Zeyrek Çinili Hamam
Check out of Harbiye Residence (09:30 AM)
Transit to Istanbul Airport (IST)
Turkish Airlines TK1039 to Bucharest (13:20 departure)

timeline.title: Romania Transit & Historic Vibe
items: Turkish Airlines TK1039 IST ➔ OTP (Arrive Bucharest 14:35)
Uber / Bolt to Calea Victoriei Airbnb (Check-in 15:30)
Stroll Calea Victoriei past CEC Palace, tour historic Stavropoleos Monastery, and walk to Revolution Square (Piața Revoluției)
Wander lively Old Town (Lipscani) & have dinner at the iconic Caru' cu Bere
Must-do: Order papanași for dessert at Caru' cu Bere

timeline.title: Bucharest Sights: Parks & Dinner
items: Stroll through the leafy lakeside paths of King Mihai I Park (formerly Herăstrău Park)
Fine dining dinner at The Artist modern molecular cuisine on Calea Victoriei (19:30)

timeline.title: Historic Bucharest & Engagement Party
items: Specialty filter coffee & breakfast at Bob Coffee Lab or Frudisiac (09:30 AM)
Tour Ceaușescu Mansion (Palatul Primăverii) in Bucharest's most exclusive district (11:30 AM - Booked)
See the stunning exterior of the Romanian Athenaeum & explore adjacent Revolution Square (Piața Revoluției) (Athenaeum interior closed Jul 10-12) (01:15 PM)
Wander down Calea Victoriei to the historic Old Town (01:45 PM)
Have a traditional Romanian lunch at the legendary Caru' cu Bere (02:15 PM)
Explore the beautiful stone-carved Stavropoleos Monastery Church & browse the white spiral balconies of Cărturești Carusel bookshop (03:45 PM)
Walk back to Airbnb, relax, and prepare for the evening event (04:15 PM - 05:00 PM)
Engagement Party - Max & Fin (07:30 PM)

timeline.title: Transylvanian Arrival & Royal Stopover
items: Check out of Bucharest Airbnb (11:50 AM)
Private driver pickup at Calea Victoriei 2 Airbnb (12:00 PM - Midday)
Drive straight to Sinaia / Peleș Castle (packed lunch in car, arrive ~01:45 PM - 02:00 PM)
Tour the majestic neo-Renaissance Peleș Castle (02:30 PM - 04:00 PM - Ticket Booked)
Meet driver and drive straight from Sinaia to Brașov (04:15 PM)
Arrive & check-in to Brașov Airbnb on Strada Lungă 39 (05:30 PM)
Walk to Old Town: Tour the historic Black Church (Closes 07:00 PM), stroll Council Square, and see Rope Street (05:45 PM - 07:15 PM)
Dinner at Sergiana for authentic, hearty traditional Romanian cuisine in a historic cellar (19:30 - Reservation Recommended)

timeline.title: Private Sighișoara & Viscri UNESCO Tour
items: Private pickup from your Brașov Airbnb (08:30 AM)
Drive to Viscri UNESCO Saxon village (08:30 AM - 10:00 AM)
Tour Viscri Fortified Church & stroll the historic village (10:00 AM)
Traditional multi-course Saxon farm lunch in Viscri (12:00 PM)
Drive to Sighișoara medieval citadel (01:15 PM - 02:00 PM)
Guided walk of Sighișoara Citadel, Scholars' Stairs, and Vlad's birthplace (02:00 PM)
Free time for photography & coffee in Sighișoara (03:30 PM)
Return drive to Brașov (04:30 PM - 06:15 PM)
Dinner at Bistro de l'Arte for slow-food Transylvanian cuisine (19:30)

timeline.title: Transfăgărășan eBike Ride to Bâlea Lake
items: Depart Brașov for Transfăgărășan highway base (08:30 AM)
Meet eBike guide & fit gear at start point (10:00 AM)
eBike climb up the Transfăgărășan pass to Bâlea Lake (10:30 AM - 01:00 PM)
Lunch at Cabana Bâlea Lac overlooking the glacial lake (01:00 PM)
Wander the glacial lake shores and enjoy alpine views (02:00 PM)
Descent & return drive to Brașov (03:00 PM - 05:30 PM)
Dinner at forest-edge Sub Tâmpa at the foot of the mountain (19:30)

timeline.title: Depart Romania via Gara de Nord
items: Check out of Braşov Airbnb (08:30 AM)
InterRegio train IR 1632 from Braşov to Bucharest Gara de Nord (09:15 AM departure)
Direct airport train from Gara de Nord to Otopeni (OTP) (12:10 PM)
Arrive at OTP Airport with safe buffer (12:30 PM)
British Airways BA875 back to London Heathrow LHR (16:15 departure)

timeline.title: Saronic Crossing

Arrive Spetses Island, check-in Teresa suite

timeline.title: Quiet Cove Sunsets
